rulings.Case Title: JAY ELLIOT VS. DATA TRANSFER OF NEVADA, LLC, FORMERLY MIGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 1, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANTS KENT HEYMAN, MAURICE GALLAGHER, ROBERT HALLIGAN, DATA TRANSFER, LLC DEMURRER TO FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off Calendar, as moot in veiw of the court's ruling on motion to strike. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JAY ELLIOT VS. DATA TRANSFER OF NEVADA, LLC, FORMERLY MIGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 1, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANTS KENT HEYMAN, MAURICE GALLAGHER, ROBERT HALLIGAN, and, DATA TRANSFER, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Is granted without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to amend the 2nd cause of action (fraud) and 3rd cause of action (intentional Infliction of emotional distress) within 10 days of the date of service of notice of the 8/28/2009 order. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: INTERFUSION TECHNOLOGY, LLC, A FLORIDA LIMITED VS. ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 1, 2010, line 5, CROSS DEFENDANT INTERFUSION TECHNOLOGY, LLC, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Is overruled. Interfusion Technology, the demurerring party, is not a named cross-defendant to the 2nd cause of action and lacks standing to demur. =(302/CWW)
